options.name: M Sport 21"

verification_notes.note: Wave 21 re-check shows the checked 09/2018 and 06/2021 BMW Germany technical-data PDFs are exact X3 xDrive20i states. Across both states they prove Allrad, 8-Gang Steptronic Getriebe, final drive 3.385, top gear 0.640, and a 225/60 R18 basic tire, which is sufficient to land those stable fields as an xDrive20i variant-scoped production override. The full xDrive20i gear-ratio array changed between the checked 2018 and 2021 official sheets (5.000 / 3.200 / 2.143 / 1.720 / 1.314 / 1.000 / 0.822 / 0.640 vs 5.250 / 3.360 / 2.172 / 1.720 / 1.316 / 1.000 / 0.822 / 0.640), so one shared exact gear-ratio array would still be unsafe. Official Germany price-list material continues to confirm the broader G01 wheel/tire matrix and xDrive30i market context, and wave 10 validation also adds exact M40i source-ledger evidence from the 04/2020 ACEA technical-data sheet: AWD, 8-Gang Steptronic Getriebe, forward ratios 5.250 / 3.360 / 2.172 / 1.720 / 1.316 / 1.000 / 0.822 / 0.640, reverse 3.712, final drive 3.385, and standard staggered 245/45 R20 front + 275/40 R20 rear tires. The broad row remains verification backlog because the xDrive20i full gear-ratio array changed between the checked official sheets, xDrive30i still lacks a directly checked exact ratio PDF in this row, and this pass did not recover year-spanning official evidence proving one unchanged M40i package across the full 2018-2024 row.
Legacy variant-source research previously recorded this variant as BMW PressClub 04/2020 technical data with High confidence.

unresolved.item: BMW X3 xDrive20i exact gear-ratio and reverse-ratio applicability across the full 2018-2024 row span
unresolved.reason: Official BMW DE xDrive20i sheets now prove final drive 3.385, top gear 0.640, and the 225/60 R18 basic tire, but the full forward gear ratios and reverse ratio differ between the checked 09/2018 and 06/2021 technical-data PDFs, so one shared gear-ratio array would be inaccurate without a year split.

unresolved.item: BMW X3 xDrive30i exact official ratio mapping
unresolved.reason: The checked 09/2018 and 06/2021 BMW Germany technical-data PDFs used in this row are exact xDrive20i sheets, while the currently retained xDrive30i notes are still supported mainly by Germany price-list context and not by one directly checked exact xDrive30i ratio PDF in this run.

unresolved.item: BMW X3 M40i production-data applicability across the full 2018-2024 row span
unresolved.reason: The checked official 04/2020 ACEA M40i sheet resolves final drive 3.385, top gear 0.640, the full forward ratio set, reverse ratio 3.712, and the standard staggered 245/45 R20 front + 275/40 R20 rear fitment, but this pass did not recover launch-year or later-year official sheets proving one unchanged M40i package across the full represented row.

unresolved.item: BMW X3 (G01, 2018-2024) full EU variant matrix beyond the exact xDrive30i and M40i mappings
unresolved.reason: This pass resolves the exact xDrive30i final drive, top gear, and Germany-market tire fitments and adds exact M40i source-ledger evidence, but it does not establish the full official ratio and tire matrix for the other G01 variants represented by the broad row.

unresolved.item: BMW X3 xDrive30i and M40i transmission subtype code
unresolved.reason: Official BMW sources prove 8-Gang Steptronic wording for the checked xDrive30i and M40i mappings but do not publish a gearbox subtype code such as a ZF 8HP variant number.
